title: rosa inodora var. szaboi
intro: Rosa inodora var. szaboi, also known as the sweetbriar or Rosa szaboi, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains linalool and geraniol. The health benefits of Rosa inodora var. szaboi include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of this plant include its use in teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and digestive issues.
